title: Provanto - Fungus Fighter Plus - Eradicates, Controls & Protects for Up To 3 Weeks - Garden Care, Plant Protection, Ready to Use Fungicide, Use Indoor & Outdoor on Flowers, Fruit & Veg, Shrubs - 1L
features: LEAF DISEASES: Controls all major leaf diseases of roses and ornamental plants, such as blackspot, powdery mildew, white rust, leaf spot, and box blight
EFFECTIVE FORMULA: Fast acting contact and systemic formula ensures it gets working quickly, whilst protecting for up to 3 weeks
SUITABLE FOR: Suitable for use on houseplants, ornamental garden plants, and select edibles
EASY TO USE: Convenient, ready to use spray with twist and lock function for quick application
HOW TO USE: Use at the first sign of infection for best results
description: From the manufacturer EXTENSIVE COVERAGE Advanced formulation for the control of common diseases on roses and ornamental plants, as well as on glasshouse crops of cucumber, courgette and summer squash. 2-in-1 PROTECTION Protects and eradicates common plant diseases such as blackspot, mildew, box blight and leaf spot, through contact and systemic action. EFFECTIVE CONTROL Keeps plants protected against further infection for up to 3 weeks.
